title: Strengthening Nutrition
subtitle: Building consistency and energy
description: At this stage, your appetite may feel stronger and more stable. Focusing on consistent, nutrient-rich meals can help support your energy levels and overall well-being as your body continues to adapt.
what_to_expect: Better energy levels throughout the day
Increased ability to maintain consistent eating habits
nutrition_focus: Include a variety of nutrient-rich foods
Focus on balanced and complete meals
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, sabzi, and salad
Fruits like banana, apple, papaya, orange, and guava
Vegetables including spinach, beans, carrots, and लौकी
Protein sources like curd, paneer, lentils, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
hydration: Drink water consistently throughout the day
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, or lemon water
reassurance: Consistent and nourishing meals can help you feel stronger and more energized.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining balanced and consistent meals supports stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils and paneer
diabetes.reassurance: Consistency in meals helps maintain stability.

anemia.personalized_description: Improved appetite allows better focus on iron-rich foods to support strength.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Regular nourishment helps build your energy steadily.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced meals with controlled salt intake support stable blood pressure.
nutrition_focus: Keep meals balanced and moderate in salt
hypertension.reassurance: Consistent meals support a calm and balanced routine.

thyroid.personalized_description: A steady and nutrient-rich diet supports overall metabolic balance.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency and balance help your body function smoothly.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, maintaining consistent and balanced meals helps support stability and overall well-being.
priority_nutrition: Avoid skipping meals or irregular eating
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Steady nourishment supports your strength and comfort.
